title: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) Reports Q1 Loss, Beats Revenue Estimates
text: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) reported Q1 results with mixed performance. The company posted a loss of $0.08 per share, matching analyst expectations. Revenue reached $34.44 million, exceeding consensus estimates by 2.50%. This represented a decline from year-ago revenues of $34.76 million. The company has beaten consensus revenue estimates twice over the last four quarters. BBAI shares have underperformed the broader market significantly, declining approximately 22.8% year-to-date compared to the S&P 500's 5.2% gain. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating, suggesting shares should perform in line with market expectations going forward. Future performance will largely depend on management commentary during the earnings call and upcoming guidance revisions.
